supportHours.launchExpectation: Founder-provided Gate A support coverage window for named-cohort pilot.

alertDestinations.route: GitHub issue: Production synthetic check failing
Sentry project for RIVT production API errors; Railway RIVT service has SENTRY_DSN configured.

alertDestinations.route: Sentry high-priority issue alert: notify suggested assignees and, if none found, recently active members for project node-express.

This is the first pilot escalation route; dedicated phone/SMS paging should be added before broader scale.
